'''âr-sh-b''' ('''karashab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knit|knit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knit|knit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-sh-b
|-
! Lemma
| karashab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirashab|thirashab]] || [[word:jirashab|jirashab]] || [[word:shirashab|shirashab]] || [[word:kirashab|kirashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurashab|thuthurashab]] || [[word:jujurashab|jujurashab]] || [[word:shushurashab|shushurashab]] || [[word:kukurashab|kukurashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurashab|thurashab]] || [[word:jurashab|jurashab]] || [[word:shurashab|shurashab]] || [[word:kurashab|kurashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurashab|thurashab]] || [[word:jurashab|jurashab]] || [[word:shurashab|shurashab]] || [[word:kurashab|kurashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therashab|therashab]] || [[word:jerashab|jerashab]] || [[word:sherashab|sherashab]] || [[word:kerashab|kerashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorashab|thothorashab]] || [[word:jojorashab|jojorashab]] || [[word:shoshorashab|shoshorashab]] || [[word:kokorashab|kokorashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorashab|thorashab]] || [[word:jorashab|jorashab]] || [[word:shorashab|shorashab]] || [[word:korashab|korashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorashab|thorashab]] || [[word:jorashab|jorashab]] || [[word:shorashab|shorashab]] || [[word:korashab|korashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrashab|thĂŠrashab]] || [[word:jĂŠrashab|jĂŠrashab]] || [[word:shĂŠrashab|shĂŠrashab]] || [[word:kĂŠrashab|kĂŠrashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharashab|thatharashab]] || [[word:jajarashab|jajarashab]] || [[word:shasharashab|shasharashab]] || [[word:kakarashab|kakarashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharashab|tharashab]] || [[word:jarashab|jarashab]] || [[word:sharashab|sharashab]] || [[word:karashab|karashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharashab|tharashab]] || [[word:jarashab|jarashab]] || [[word:sharashab|sharashab]] || [[word:karashab|karashab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharashab|sharashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharashab|gosharashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharashab|gokisharashab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharashabnĂŒ|sharashabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharashabnknĂŒ|gosharashabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashabnĂŒ|gokisharashabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharashabshĂ«|sharashabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharashabnkshĂ«|gosharashabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharashabshĂ«|gokisharashabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashabro|sharashabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashabnkro|gosharashabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashabro|gokisharashabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashabmu|sharashabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashabnkmu|gosharashabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashabmu|gokisharashabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharashabsher|sharashabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharashabnksher|gosharashabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharashabsher|gokisharashabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharashabng|sharashabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharashabnkng|gosharashabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharashabng|gokisharashabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharashabya|sharashabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharashabnkya|gosharashabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharashabya|gokisharashabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharashabyam|sharashabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharashabnkyam|gosharashabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharashabyam|gokisharashabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashabnĂŒshĂ«|sharashabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashabnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharashabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashabnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharashabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashabnĂŒro|sharashabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashabnknĂŒro|gosharashabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashabnĂŒro|gokisharashabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashabnĂŒmu|sharashabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashabnknĂŒmu|gosharashabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashabnĂŒmu|gokisharashabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashabshĂ«nĂŒ|sharashabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharashabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharashabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashabshĂ«ro|sharashabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashabnkshĂ«ro|gosharashabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashabshĂ«ro|gokisharashabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashabshĂ«mu|sharashabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashabnkshĂ«mu|gosharashabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashabshĂ«mu|gokisharashabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashabronĂŒ|sharashabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashabnkronĂŒ|gosharashabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashabronĂŒ|gokisharashabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashabroshĂ«|sharashabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashabnkroshĂ«|gosharashabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashabroshĂ«|gokisharashabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashabromu|sharashabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashabnkromu|gosharashabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashabromu|gokisharashabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashabmunĂŒ|sharashabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashabnkmunĂŒ|gosharashabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashabmunĂŒ|gokisharashabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashabmushĂ«|sharashabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashabnkmushĂ«|gosharashabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashabmushĂ«|gokisharashabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashabmuro|sharashabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashabnkmuro|gosharashabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashabmuro|gokisharashabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
